what: Compute approximate total coverage combining line coverage and test breadth — compute_total_coverage
title: Compute approximate total coverage combining line coverage and test breadth — compute_total_coverage
text: Computes approximate "total coverage" metric combining: 1) line coverage percentage (`percent_cov`, 0–100), 2) conservative proxy breadth tests based counts passing    test files, functions without tests, skipped test files. final metric scales line coverage (proportion) fraction tested total function-space, : - `n_testfiles` = number passing test files (0, treated 1 avoid divide--zero), - `n_no_function_tests` = number functions lacking tests (`nrow(functions_no_tests_df)`), - `n_skipped_files` = number skipped test files (`length(tests_skipped)`), - `total_functions` = `n_tested + n_untested` `n_tested = max(n_testfiles, 1)`, - `total_cov` = (percent_cov / 100) * (n_tested / total_functions).

title: Compute approximate total coverage combining line coverage and test breadth — compute_total_coverage
Compute approximate total coverage combining line coverage and test breadth — compute_total_coverage
text: percent_cov Numeric scalar. Line coverage percentage (0–100). functions_no_tests_df `data.frame` (`NULL`) functions lacking tests. tests_passing character vector (`NULL`) passing test file paths/names. tests_skipped character vector (`NULL`) skipped test file paths/names.

title: Compute approximate total coverage combining line coverage and test breadth — compute_total_coverage
text: named list : total_cov (numeric): Approximate total coverage (proportion 0–1). percent_cov_round (numeric): total_cov rounded 2 decimals (still 0–1). n_testfiles (integer): Count passing test files. n_no_function_tests (integer): Count functions lacking tests. n_skipped_files (integer): Count skipped test files.

title: Compute approximate total coverage combining line coverage and test breadth — compute_total_coverage

title: Package-Private Coverage Environment — cov_env
text: **built?** package setup, `R/` files parsed evaluated part namespace loading. point line executed: “` cov_env <- new.env(parent = baseenv()) “` creates binding `cov_env` package namespace **** namespace locked R. namespace locked, add remove bindings—may change *values* existing bindings. pre-creating `cov_env`, tests can safely temporarily replace (e.g., `testthat::local_mocked_bindings()`), modify *existing* binding rather creating new one.  (See: R’s environment/namespace locking rules testthat’s guidance mocked bindings must already exist.)  [1](https://colinfay./writing-r-extensions/writing-r-documentation-files.html)[2](https://contributor.r-project.org/cran-cookbook/code_issues.html) **`parent = baseenv()`?** Using `baseenv()` isolates lookups fall user’s workspace. keeps internal state separate avoids accidental reads writes `.GlobalEnv`.  [3](https://github.com/coolbutuseless/CRAN-checks) **Testing tip:** unit tests, can temporarily replace binding without editing global environment: “` testthat::local_mocked_bindings(   .package = "yourpkg",   cov_env  = new.env(parent = baseenv()) ) “` works `cov_env` *binding already exists* namespace; `local_mocked_bindings()` create new bindings locked namespace. text: 1. **Dependency parsing**    Parses entries form `"pkg"` `"pkg (op version)"`,    operator `op` one `>=`, `>`, `<=`, `<`, `==`. HTML-escaped forms    (`>`, `<`) normalized. 2. **Dependency fields**    Dependencies extracted `Depends`, `Imports`, `Suggests`    fields. `Depends: R (>= x.y.z)` entry ignored installation    purposes, R version constraint validated. 3. **Base/recommended packages**    Unlike tools `R CMD check`, function **skip**    recommended base packages (e.g., `graphics`, `stats`, `utils`,    `grDevices`) packages listed `Depends:` must made visible    target evaluation environment even parent `baseenv()`.    package already installed R, installation attempted. 4. **Availability version checks**    Package presence determined via `requireNamespace(pkg, quietly = TRUE)`    instead `installed.packages()`, performance portability.    version constraint declared, installed version (   `packageDescription(pkg, fields = "Version")`) compared using    `utils::compareVersion()`. 5. **Package installation**    - constraints form `>=` `>`:      `install.packages()` used (latest version assumed valid).    - `<=`, `<`, `==`:      `remotes::install_version()` used install exact version. 6. **Loading behavior**    dependency namespace-loaded via `loadNamespace()`.    Packages appear `Depends` field **exported    symbols imported** supplied `env`. makes calls    `plot()`, `lm()`, `head()` resolve correctly inside environments whose    parent `.GlobalEnv`.
